channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Could Yogurt Reduce Colon Cancer Risk?
11 Natural Ways to Lower Your Cortisol Levels
Common Walking Mistakes and How to Fix Them
item.description: Walking is an excellent low-impact exercise, but poor footwear, pace, or routine can hinder progress and increase injury risk.

item.title: You Don't Have to Feel Called to Medicine to Be a Good Doctor [PODCAST]
item.description: Subscribe to The Podcast by KevinMD. Watch on YouTube. Catch up on old episodes! Is medicine a calling or just a job? Christie Mulholland explores this question.
